key.name: panel-height
key.description: Custom height in pixels for the phone status bar. Use this to accommodate a notch or camera punch hole. 0 means use the GNOME default height.

key.name: panel-padding-left
key.description: Left padding in pixels for the status bar, to accommodate display border radius or camera punch holes.

key.name: panel-padding-right
key.description: Right padding in pixels for the status bar, to accommodate display border radius or camera punch holes.

key.name: statusbar-max-notification-icons
key.description: Maximum number of notification icons visible in the status bar. Additional notifications are indicated by a dot.

key.name: phone-panel-corner-offset
key.description: Vertical offset in pixels for the panel corners on phone displays. Increase to push the corners further down below the status bar.

key.name: gesture-bar-height
key.description: Height in pixels for the bottom gesture bar on phone displays. Ignored on non-phone displays.

key.name: edge-back-gesture-enabled
key.description: Enable left and right edge swipe gestures for back navigation on phone displays.

key.name: vibration-intensity
key.description: Vibration motor intensity from 0 (off) to 100 (max). Controls the strength of all haptic feedback.

key.name: vibration-on-keypress
key.description: Trigger a short haptic buzz when a key is pressed on the on-screen keyboard.

key.name: vibration-on-slider-change
key.description: Trigger a short haptic buzz when the hardware alert slider (tri-state toggle) is moved.

key.name: auto-rotate-tilt-lock
key.description: When enabled, auto-rotate is suppressed if the phone is nearly flat (face-up or face-down), preventing unwanted rotation when the user is lying on their side.

key.name: home-feedback-sounds
key.description: Play subtle feedback sounds for home interactions such as drag start, page snap, drop, and remove.

key.name: volume-osd-side
key.description: Which screen edge the volume OSD appears on in phone mode. One of: 'left', 'right'.

key.name: usb-mode
key.description: Controls the USB-C port role. 'default' leaves the kernel in control, 'host' forces host mode for peripherals, 'device' forces device/gadget mode for charging and tethering.

key.name: dock-pinned-apps
key.description: App desktop IDs pinned to the phone dock, independent of the desktop taskbar's favourite-apps. An empty array means not yet initialised (will be populated from favourite-apps on first run).

key.name: app-grid-layout
key.description: JSON array encoding the custom app grid order. Each element is either an app ID string or a folder object {"name":"...","apps":["..."]}. Empty string means alphabetical order.

key.name: home-screen-layout
key.description: JSON: {"cols":4,"items":[{"id":"app.desktop","col":0,"row":0}, ...]}

key.name: rounded-corners-enabled
key.description: Whether to apply rounded corners to windows.

key.name: window-corner-radius
key.description: Corner radius in pixels for maximized windows. 0 disables.

key.name: window-corner-smoothing
key.description: Squircle smoothing factor (0 = circular, higher = smoother iOS-style curves). Range 0.0-1.0.

key.name: taskbar-secondary-mode
key.description: How the taskbar behaves on large displays. 'visible' keeps it always visible; 'hidden' auto-hides it and shows on hover.

key.name: taskbar-autohide-hover
key.description: When taskbar visibility is set to auto-hide, show the taskbar when hovering the bottom edge of the screen.

key.name: taskbar-monitor-mode
key.description: On multi-monitor setups, choose whether the taskbar is available on all displays ('all') or constrained to one display ('single').

key.name: taskbar-single-monitor-target
key.description: When taskbar monitor mode is 'single', select which display hosts the taskbar: 'primary' or 'focused'.

key.name: taskbar-hide-when-overlapped
key.summary: Hide taskbar when windows overlap it
key.description: Automatically hide the taskbar when a normal window occupies the taskbar area.

key.name: taskbar-maximized-avoid-taskbar
key.summary: Keep maximized windows clear of taskbar
key.description: Hide the taskbar whenever a maximized normal window is present.

key.name: taskbar-panel-mode
key.description: When enabled, the taskbar spans the monitor edge like a panel.

key.name: taskbar-thickness
key.description: Taskbar thickness in logical pixels. 0 = auto. Applied as width when taskbar position is left/right, height when bottom.

key.name: taskbar-show-left-box
key.description: Show the GNOME panel left box in the taskbar.

key.name: taskbar-show-center-box
key.description: Show the GNOME panel center box (clock/calendar) in the taskbar.

key.name: taskbar-show-right-box
key.description: Show the GNOME panel right box (quick settings/indicators) in the taskbar.

key.name: taskbar-icon-size
key.description: App icon size in pixels for the taskbar. 0 = auto (derived from adaptive scaling).

key.name: taskbar-show-window-previews
key.description: Show window preview thumbnails when hovering over taskbar icons.

key.name: taskbar-app-grid-icon
key.description: Custom icon for the app grid button in the taskbar. Accepts an icon name or absolute file path. Empty string uses the default.

key.name: taskbar-panel-background-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the taskbar panel background when panel mode is enabled (10-100).

key.name: taskbar-animate-opening-apps
key.description: Animate taskbar and grid icons when launching applications.

key.name: taskbar-show-open-indicators
key.description: Show running/focused indicators on taskbar app icons.

key.name: taskbar-highlight-fill-enabled
key.description: Show background fill for running/focused taskbar app highlights.

key.name: taskbar-highlight-edge-enabled
key.description: Show bottom edge for running/focused taskbar app highlights.

key.name: taskbar-highlight-strip-enabled
key.description: Show additional running-state strip layer for taskbar app highlights.

key.name: taskbar-minimize-animation-style
key.description: Animation style for minimizing windows. One of: 'scale', 'genie'.

key.name: taskbar-minimize-into-app-icon
key.description: Animate minimized windows toward their taskbar app icon.

key.name: taskbar-animate-hover
key.description: Animate taskbar icons on mouse hover.

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-type
key.description: Type of hover animation: SIMPLE, RIPPLE, or PLANK.

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-duration
key.description: Duration of the hover animation in milliseconds (0-300).

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-rotation
key.description: Rotation in degrees applied during hover animation (-30 to 30).

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-travel
key.description: Translation as a fraction of icon size (-1.0 to 1.0).

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-zoom
key.description: Scale factor for the hover animation (0.5 to 2.5).

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-convexity
key.description: Convexity of the hover animation curve (0.0 to 3.0).

key.name: taskbar-hover-animation-extent
key.description: Number of neighbouring icons affected by RIPPLE/PLANK animation (1-10).

key.name: taskbar-hover-highlight-enabled
key.description: Show a coloured background behind taskbar icons on hover.

key.name: taskbar-hover-highlight-color
key.description: Background colour applied to taskbar icons on hover.

key.name: taskbar-hover-highlight-pressed-color
key.description: Background colour applied to taskbar icons when pressed.

key.name: taskbar-hover-highlight-border-radius
key.description: Border radius in pixels for the hover highlight (0-24).

key.name: taskbar-hover-highlight-running-color
key.description: Background colour for taskbar icons of running applications.

key.name: taskbar-hover-highlight-focused-color
key.description: Background colour for the taskbar icon of the focused application.

key.name: independent-workspaces
key.description: Each monitor has its own workspace stack. Switching workspaces on one monitor does not affect the others.

key.name: independent-workspaces-vanilla-primary
key.description: When enabled with independent workspaces, the primary display follows GNOME's native global workspace behaviour.

key.name: workspace-shortcut-target-monitor
key.description: When independent workspaces are enabled, keyboard shortcuts target either the monitor under the pointer or the focused monitor.

key.name: show-home-in-overview
key.description: Keep the home screen layer visible behind workspaces while GNOME overview is open.

key.name: qs-toggle-order
key.description: Ordered list of quick settings toggle IDs. Empty means default order. New toggles are appended.

key.name: qs-hidden-toggles
key.description: List of quick settings toggle IDs that should be hidden from the notification panel.

key.name: notification-panel-scale-phone
key.description: Scale multiplier percentage for the notification panel in phone mode. 100 = default size, 50 = half size, 150 = one and a half times.

key.name: notification-panel-scale-desktop
key.description: Scale multiplier percentage for the notification panel in desktop mode. 100 = default size, 50 = half size, 150 = one and a half times.

key.name: notification-banner-position
key.description: Position for notification banners. 0=default, 1=top left, 2=top centre, 3=top right, 4=bottom left, 5=bottom centre, 6=bottom right.

key.name: taskbar-notification-badges
key.summary: Show notification badges on taskbar icons
key.description: Display notification count badges on taskbar icons when unread notifications are present.

key.name: tray-notification-enabled
key.summary: Show tray area in notification panel
key.description: Display a persistent notification in the notification panel showing system tray icons with interactive menus.

key.name: desktop-notification-panel-enabled
key.summary: Use Convergence notification panel on desktop
key.description: Replace GNOME's Quick Settings panel with the Convergence notification panel when in desktop mode.

key.name: desktop-tray-location
key.description: Where to show the system tray area on desktop. 'top-panel' shows icons in the GNOME top panel, 'notification-panel' shows them inside the Convergence notification panel, 'both' shows in both locations, 'none' hides the tray area entirely.

key.name: desktop-tray-enabled
key.summary: Show tray icons in desktop top panel
key.description: Display system tray icons in the desktop top panel with interactive context menus.

key.name: desktop-max-notification-icons
key.summary: Max notification icons in desktop top panel
key.description: Maximum number of notification icons visible in the desktop top panel. Additional notifications are indicated by a dot.

key.name: taskbar-dynamic-opacity
key.description: Make taskbar transparent when no maximised windows are present, opaque when one is.

key.name: taskbar-dynamic-opacity-min
key.description: Minimum opacity percentage when no maximised windows are present (10-100).

key.name: taskbar-intellihide
key.description: Auto-hide taskbar when windows overlap; reveal on pointer-at-edge.

key.name: widget-weather-location
key.description: City name for the weather widget. Leave empty to default to London, United Kingdom.

key.name: widget-clock-format
key.description: Time format for the clock widget. One of: 24h, 12h.

key.name: widget-clock-show-seconds
key.description: Whether to display seconds in the clock widget.

key.name: widget-trash-icon-empty
key.description: Custom icon name for the empty recycle bin. Leave empty for the default.

key.name: widget-trash-icon-full
key.description: Custom icon name for the non-empty recycle bin. Leave empty for the default.

key.name: widget-hwmon-show-cores
key.description: Whether to show per-core CPU usage bars in the System Monitor widget.

key.name: show-display-debug-label
key.description: Show a label in the status bar displaying the detected host device type and primary display mode.

key.name: debug-log-level
key.description: Controls extension log verbosity. One of: error, warn, info, debug.

key.name: debug-mock-notifications
key.description: Inject sample notifications into the notification panel for testing.

key.name: demo-mode
key.description: Hide private details such as real location. Weather widget shows London instead.

key.name: debug-show-app-memory
key.summary: Show app memory usage in recent apps
key.description: Display the RAM usage of each app next to its name in the recent apps screen.

key.name: debug-phone-simulation
key.description: When enabled, a touchscreen laptop in portrait orientation uses phone mode regardless of display scaling. The device switches to desktop mode in landscape.

key.name: prefs-open-page
key.description: Internal key used to request opening a specific preferences tab.
